# Yolanda Ngcuka Holdings

> 100% black-woman-owned environmental consulting firm specialising in mining regulatory compliance, audits, monitoring, and rehabilitation across South Africa.

Yolanda Ngcuka Holdings (Pty) Ltd is headquartered in Newcastle, KwaZulu-Natal, and supports mining projects across the full lifecycle—from exploration and authorisation through operations, rehabilitation, and closure.

## Site

- [Home](https://yolandangcukaholdings.co.za/): Company overview and primary call to action
- [About](https://yolandangcukaholdings.co.za/about-page): Business overview, ownership, and mission
- [Services](https://yolandangcukaholdings.co.za/services-page): Authorisation, audits, monitoring, and rehabilitation services
- [Team](https://yolandangcukaholdings.co.za/team): Leadership and technical team
- [Projects](https://yolandangcukaholdings.co.za/projects): Environmental project case studies
- [Notices](https://yolandangcukaholdings.co.za/notices): Public notices and regulatory documents
- [Contact](https://yolandangcukaholdings.co.za/contact): Consultation enquiry form

## Contact
